questions.question: Who was the king of Babylon when Daniel was taken into captivity?
Who was the chief officer under King Nebuchadnezzar who brought the young men of Judah into the palace?
What was the right choice Daniel and his friends made?
options: To honor God and avoid sin
questions.answer: To honor God and avoid sin

questions.question: Why was eating the king's food a problem?
options: It was offered to idols and unclean according to Jewish law
questions.answer: It was offered to idols and unclean according to Jewish law

questions.question: Psalms 25:12 "Who is the man that __________? Him shall He teach in the way He chooses."
How long were Daniel and his friends trained before serving the king?
Daniel and his friends overcome temptation by ___________
Why did God allow His people to be taken into Babylon captivity?
questions.answer: Because Israel disobeyed God and worshipped idols, so God allowed captivity as discipline.

questions.question: What happened when Daniel and his friends refused the king's food?
questions.answer: They appeared healthier and stronger than those who ate the king's food.

questions.question: How did God reward Daniel and his friends for their obedience?
questions.answer: God gave them wisdom, favor, and high positions in Babylon, and Daniel received understanding of dreams and visions.

questions.question: What choices did Daniel and his friends make in Babylon, and what was the result?
questions.answer: They chose to stay faithful to God, refused to defile themselves, and God blessed them with wisdom, health, and promotion in the kingdom.

questions.question: What is the reward God has promised to those who overcome temptation?
